Back-end docs (work in progress)

Please accept our sincerest apologies for how scuffed this page looks. We had to rush to meet the phase 1 deadline of the project assignment. We struggled to find a decent free tool for database diagrams and used whatever this god forsaken thing is (eraser.io). We are quite satisfied with the API docs however (generated automatically from our Bruno collection 😁).
